action.reasoning: Observation: The fixed feature-head prediction path now gives the best score (macro_f1=0.1749) from a CLIP-B cached-feature head, and checkpoint metadata shows the working format. Analysis: The strongest low-risk improvement is to train the same stable feature-head approach on stronger CLIP-L/14 image features, keeping the already-working feature_head checkpoint format so predict.py can load it unchanged. Decision: Add a CLIP-L feature caching/training script with calibrated validation macro-F1 selection, run it, and submit the resulting checkpoint for evaluation.
